comments: Approved. The amendment satisfies the review packet criteria. It clearly explains the rationale for re-sequencing by stating that the originally planned M2 and M5 work was reordered under the human-authorized Autonomous Milestone flow so repository cleanup happened first. The executed sequence is correctly restated and matches repo evidence: tasks/v0.6-m1-execution-result.json records completed Repository Hygiene (.DS_Store purge / ignore verification), and tasks/v0.6-m2-execution-result.json records completed Historical Archive Consolidation (moving audit/, qa/, release/, and retros/ into .archive/ with a manifest). The remaining required V0.6 objectives are also correctly mapped across M3-M6: Documentation Center Unification in M3 aligns with the docs-center blueprint and kickoff packet; Bootstrap & Enablement in M4 aligns with the post-V0.5 bootstrap plan; Read-Only API hardening plus integration-smoke and V0.5 carry-overs (Path Resolution Fragility, Reviewer Output Delivery, Approval Gating Automation) are explicitly preserved in M5; and framework/execution-state separation plus comparison against labs-teamwork-spec are explicitly placed in M6. Previously approved goals are not dropped. The original V0.6 scope and kickoff materials required repository normalization, task artifact archival, docs replacement/purging, bootstrap work, and comparative synthesis; the amendment now distributes those obligations across executed M1/M2 and remaining M3-M6, with M6 explicitly carrying the residual normalization work by archiving V0.4/V0.5 tasks artifacts and purging redundant old docs, which completes the Repository Normalization goal rather than omitting it. The amendment is itself a planning document under tasks/ and, on its face, does not modify implementation files or directories.
